definitions.text: To rotate, revolve, gyrate (usually quickly); to partially or completely rotate to face another direction.
examples: I spun myself around a few times.
Spin the ball on the floor.

definitions.text: To enter, or remain in, a spin (abnormal stalled flight mode).
To cause one's aircraft to enter or remain in a spin (abnormal stalled flight mode).

examples: The car went into a spin.

definitions.text: A special interest of an autistic person.
